---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Why is it needed?

## Proposed Solution

How would you like it to work?

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered other approaches?

## Privacy Impact

Does this feature involve email content flowing to a new place? If so, describe the data flow.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, links to relevant ATS systems, etc.
